title: Zalingei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zalingei with a Z-Score of +4.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Zalingei is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, and wind speed is at 12.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
